questions.question: What does `v-memo="[]"` do to a template subtree?
options: Acts like `v-once` — the content is never re-rendered
Memoizes based on all reactive dependencies
Clears the subtree on each render

questions.question: In which scenario is `v-memo` most useful for performance?
options: Large lists where only a few items change at a time

questions.question: When should you NOT use `v-once`?
options: On footer content with a fixed copyright year
On elements that contain reactive data that may change after mount
On company name or branding text
On static configuration values displayed in the UI
